name: methylammonium_pka_acidity
prompt: Run the pka-acidity task for methylammonium (cationic acid) using the GFN2-xTB method in implicit water (absolute mode). Pass the protonated form with --ha and the deprotonated form with --a-minus (HA charge 1). Report the aqueous pKa as the headline value, and state the method, mode, and charges used. Note xtb absolute pKa is screening-grade. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
